results.rendered_html:
abhyas 4 P.
1 To practise, exercise; dhanyo vanyamataṃgajaḥ paricayaprāgalbhyamabhyasyati  Māl. 9. 32 ; abhyasyatīva vratamāsidhāraṃ  R. 13. 67 ;  Ms. 11. 107. 
2 To repeat, perform repeatedly; mṛgakulaṃ romaṃthamabhyasyatu  Ś. 2. 6 ; abhyasyaṃti taṭāghātaṃ  Ku. 2. 50 ;  K. 183. 
3 To learn, study, acquire or learn by practice, recite, read; vedameva sadābhyasyet  Ms. 2. 166 ; 4. 147 ; 4. 149 ;  Y. 3. 204 ;  K. 79. 
4 To throw down upon, heap one upon another, accumulate, lay on (Ved.).
5 To throw or fling at, shoot or aim at (as arrows).
